name: lok8s
description: Kubernetes deployment framework for Hetzner — the `lo` CLI (kind/KubeOne/CAPI/KKP drivers), kustomize + Helm, and a Tilt dev loop.

scripts.lint: find .lok8s operator/hooks -type f -name '*.sh' | xargs shellcheck --shell=bash --severity=warning && grep -rlE '^#!/usr/bin/env (argsh|bash)' .lok8s operator/hooks | xargs shellcheck --shell=bash --severity=warning
